// ZMAX — PORT REPORT

Port Report / Home / Engineering Report / Keybinding Coverage / GitHub

Coverage of the Vim/Neovim + Emacs + Spacemacs feature surface; numerator re-derived from source every run.

>_HEADLINE

Auto-generated by scripts/gen_port_report.py. Numerator re-derived from zmax source on every run; denominator is the cited inventories under port/data/ (Vim/Neovim runtime docs, GNU Emacs manual indexes, Spacemacs documentation). Headline coverage counts ported only.

>_FUNCTIONALITY COVERAGE

The per-source tables below measure muscle-memory compatibility with each ancestor editor instead. They overlap heavily (the same capability counted once per source), and the Emacs denominator is the entire GNU Emacs manual — games, Dired, Gnus, Calc, TeX-mode and all — so a low per-source percentage reflects scope and duplication, not missing functionality.
